name: kosta-plugins
description: Kosta's Claude Code plugin marketplace — design tools, research agents, and productivity plugins.

plugins.name: stitch-studio
plugins.description: Google Stitch integration — AI-powered UI design generation, token extraction, and SwiftUI/React conversion.

plugins.name: subagent-forge
plugins.description: Research-first subagent orchestration — product scouting, forum sentiment, GitHub audits, academic discovery, QA critique.

plugins.name: ios-craft
plugins.description: Complete iOS development companion — guided workflows for project setup, SwiftUI, networking, testing, Metal, design systems, accessibility, CI/CD, and App Store submission. 15 skills, 6 agents, 12 commands. Built for beginners who vibe code.

plugins.name: productivity-forge
plugins.description: Compliance-grade document verification and editing. 9-step agentic loop with Claim Ledger, 13 reviewer agents, integrity gates, and 8-domain support. For grants, legal, financial, medical, and engineering documents.

plugins.name: coding-forge
plugins.description: Phased build orchestration with sub-agents for research, TDD, implementation, and dual code review — gated per phase. Master orchestrator plans phases, dispatches specialist agents, and enforces build/test/review gates before each commit.
